title: Law No. 14 of 2013 Issuing the Civil Aviation Law
summary: Requires unmanned aircraft to operate in Bahrain only with authorisation from Civil Aviation Affairs and provides the legal basis for regulating drone operations and related approvals.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.autonomous_smart_system: Bahrain’s civil aviation law includes authorisation requirements for unmanned aircraft.

notes: Related instruments: Amended by Law No. 4 of 2022 and supported by Civil Aviation Affairs drone permit framework
